_sectionsNote: Each value is the Order number (from lesson-1-airtable-import.csv) of the sentence(s) that belong in that section -- a single number, or an array like [3, 27] for more than one. This is real data, not a placeholder: edit it, then ask Claude to apply it -- Airtable's Section field gets set to "<key> - <title>" (titles from lesson-1-section-seed.csv) for exactly the Order numbers you list, and stays blank for everything else.
